name: Galerie Vivienne and nearby covered passages
summary: A beautiful, low-commitment Paris culture walk through 19th-century covered passages near Palais-Royal and the old Bourse.
whyItMatters: Paris hotel/walk areas are not defined yet, so this is a flexible short stop that does not depend on timed museum tickets.
timeRequired: 20-60 minutes depending on whether it is a single passage or a small loop.
ticketOrReservationNeed: No ticket for a basic walk; passage hours vary.
pros: Works in poor weather because of the covered arcade setting
Easy to pair with cafes, bookshops, Palais-Royal, or Louvre/Opera-area walking
cons: Only useful if Paris lodging or plans are reasonably central/right-bank
Private passage hours can change and some shops may close earlier than expected

logistics.opening_hours: Galerie Vivienne is commonly listed as daytime public access; verify current passage hours before relying on it.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not tied to a Tour stage viewing point.
logistics.transit: Metro Bourse or Palais Royal - Musee du Louvre area, depending on route.
logistics.road_closure_notes: No TDF-specific closure assumed; verify Paris event disruptions if dates are known.

timing.best_visit_window: Paris arrival/departure margin, rainy window, or pre-dinner walk.

nearbyFoodDrinkPairing: Pair with coffee or wine near Palais-Royal, Rue Vivienne, or the wider covered-passage loop toward Passage des Panoramas.
